description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named SNL-CI that runs on pull request events for files not matching *.md. The workflow should cancel any in-progress runs for the same workflow and reference. Use a custom environment job that runs on snl-kk-env-cuda-12.2.0-gcc-11.3.0-latest, checks out the kokkos repository at the base reference, configures Kokkos with CUDA 12.2 and C++20, builds and installs Kokkos, and runs tests with ctest.
